Name: Chocolatey - Manage Features
Description: Allows enabling and disabling of Chocolatey features.

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyFeatureName
Parameters.Label: (Required) Feature Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The feature name to manage. Multiple feature can be specified separated by a space. 

Examples:

* _checksumFiles_
* _autoUninstaller_ _allowGlobalConfirmation_

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyFeatureAction
Parameters.Label: (Required) Feature Action
Parameters.HelpText: The action to perform on the feature name.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
enable|Enable the feature
disable|Disable the feature

Parameters.Name: ChocolateyFeatureOtherParameters
Parameters.Label: (Optional) Other Chocolatey Parameters
Parameters.HelpText:
Other parameters to pass to Chocolatey. You can pass multiple parameters separated by a space.

Examples:

* _--debug_
* _--debug_ _--verbose_
